title: oSzoukaua's: Items don't last
description:
Makes it so that items will tick down their despawn timer even when in unloaded chunks.

also allows for setting a custom despawn duration
body:
# Description: This pack makes it so that items will continue to tick down their despawn timers, even in unloaded chunks and other dimensions.
It also adds the ability to set a **custom despawn timer duration**, this can be done through the following command: ``` /scoreboard players set despawn_duration oszu_idl_time XXX ``` Replace "**XXX**" with the desired dewpawn timer duration in ticks, _1 second is 20 ticks_

The default despawn timer duration in Minecraft is **5 minutes**, which is **300 seconds**, which is **6000 ticks** _1 minute would be 1200 ticks_

## Notes:
Server-Side: meaning that it needs to be installed either on a singleplayer world, or on the server host side






## Other:

You are free to use this pack in modpacks/youtube videos and many other forms of sharing
